inbound_message.subject: Quote Request - Packaging Hardware
inbound_message.body:
Hi,

We need a quote for some packaging hardware:

- 1000x M6 Hex Bolt, Zinc Plated, Grade 4.6
- Some M6 Hex Nuts (quantity TBC - waiting on project manager)

Let us know pricing when you can.

Tom Bashir
Nova Packaging Ltd

line_items.raw_text: M6 Hex Bolt, Zinc Plated, Grade 4.6
